mapper.select: SELECT agent.id AS agentId, agent.agent_code AS agentCode, agent.agent_name AS agentName, agent.description AS agentDescription, agent.agent_type AS agentType, agent.STATUS AS agentStatus, tenant.id AS tenantId, tenant.tenant_name AS tenantName, tenant.STATUS AS tenantStatus, tenant.nacos_namespace_id AS tenantNacosNamespaceId, tenant.remark AS tenantRemark, ac.id AS agentConfigId, ac.version_no AS versionNo, ac.sys_prompt_id AS sysPromptId, ac.model_id AS modelId, ac.max_iters AS maxIters, ac.workspace_path AS workspacePath, ac.permission_mode AS permissionMode, ac.visual_schema_json AS visualSchemaJson, ac.agent_permission_policy_id AS agentPermissionPolicyId, ac.publish_status AS publishStatus, ac.published_at AS publishedAt, ac.context_enabled AS contextEnabled, ac.trigger_messages AS triggerMessages, ac.keep_messages AS keepMessages, ac.trigger_tokens AS triggerTokens, ac.keep_tokens AS keepTokens, ac.flush_before_compact AS flushBeforeCompact, ac.offload_before_compact AS offloadBeforeCompact, ac.compaction_model_config_id AS compactionModelConfigId, ac.truncate_args_enabled AS truncateArgsEnabled, ac.truncate_args_max_chars AS truncateArgsMaxChars, ac.tool_result_eviction_enabled AS toolResultEvictionEnabled, ac.tool_result_max_chars AS toolResultMaxChars, ac.memory_enable AS memoryEnable, ac.plan_mode_enabled AS planModeEnabled, ac.plan_file_directory AS planFileDirectory, ac.task_list_enabled AS taskListEnabled, ac.allow_shell_in_plan_mode AS allowShellInPlanMode, ac.plan_exit_approval_required AS planExitApprovalRequired, ac.plan_max_steps AS planMaxSteps, ac.plan_auto_enter_enabled AS planAutoEnterEnabled, ac.plan_prompt AS planPrompt, ac.sandbox_enabled AS sandboxEnabled, ac.sandbox_config_id AS sandboxConfigId, model.id AS modelId, model.provider AS provider, model.base_URL AS baseUrl, model.api_key AS apiKey, model.model_name AS modelName, model.model_type AS modelType, model.streaming AS streaming, model.thinking AS thinking, model.temperature AS temperature, model.top_p AS topP, model.max_tokens AS maxTokens, model.timeout_ms AS timeoutMs, model.max_attempts AS maxAttempts, model.fallback_model_config_id AS fallbackModelConfigId, model.STATUS AS modelStatus, sp.prompt_name promptName, sp.sys_prompt sysPrompt FROM ai_agent agent LEFT JOIN sys_tenant tenant ON agent.tenant_id = tenant.id LEFT JOIN ai_agent_config ac ON ac.agent_id = agent.id AND ac.deleted = 0 AND ac.publish_status = 1 LEFT JOIN ai_agent_model model ON model.id = ac.model_id AND model.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ai_agent_sys_prompt sp ON sp.id = ac.sys_prompt_id WHERE agent.id = #{agentId} AND agent.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ac.published_at DESC, ac.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT agent.id AS agentId, agent.agent_code AS agentCode, agent.agent_name AS agentName, agent.description AS agentDescription, agent.agent_type AS agentType, agent.STATUS AS agentStatus, tenant.id AS tenantId, tenant.tenant_name AS tenantName, tenant.STATUS AS tenantStatus, tenant.nacos_namespace_id AS tenantNacosNamespaceId, tenant.remark AS tenantRemark, ac.id AS agentConfigId, ac.version_no AS versionNo, ac.sys_prompt_id AS sysPromptId, ac.model_id AS modelId, ac.max_iters AS maxIters, ac.workspace_path AS workspacePath, ac.permission_mode AS permissionMode, ac.visual_schema_json AS visualSchemaJson, ac.agent_permission_policy_id AS agentPermissionPolicyId, ac.publish_status AS publishStatus, ac.published_at AS publishedAt, ac.context_enabled AS contextEnabled, ac.trigger_messages AS triggerMessages, ac.keep_messages AS keepMessages, ac.trigger_tokens AS triggerTokens, ac.keep_tokens AS keepTokens, ac.flush_before_compact AS flushBeforeCompact, ac.offload_before_compact AS offloadBeforeCompact, ac.compaction_model_config_id AS compactionModelConfigId, ac.truncate_args_enabled AS truncateArgsEnabled, ac.truncate_args_max_chars AS truncateArgsMaxChars, ac.tool_result_eviction_enabled AS toolResultEvictionEnabled, ac.tool_result_max_chars AS toolResultMaxChars, ac.memory_enable AS memoryEnable, ac.plan_mode_enabled AS planModeEnabled, ac.plan_file_directory AS planFileDirectory, ac.task_list_enabled AS taskListEnabled, ac.allow_shell_in_plan_mode AS allowShellInPlanMode, ac.plan_exit_approval_required AS planExitApprovalRequired, ac.plan_max_steps AS planMaxSteps, ac.plan_auto_enter_enabled AS planAutoEnterEnabled, ac.plan_prompt AS planPrompt, ac.sandbox_enabled AS sandboxEnabled, ac.sandbox_config_id AS sandboxConfigId, model.id AS modelId, model.provider AS provider, model.base_URL AS baseUrl, model.api_key AS apiKey, model.model_name AS modelName, model.model_type AS modelType, model.streaming AS streaming, model.thinking AS thinking, model.temperature AS temperature, model.top_p AS topP, model.max_tokens AS maxTokens, model.timeout_ms AS timeoutMs, model.max_attempts AS maxAttempts, model.fallback_model_config_id AS fallbackModelConfigId, model.STATUS AS modelStatus, sp.prompt_name promptName, sp.sys_prompt sysPrompt FROM ai_agent agent LEFT JOIN sys_tenant tenant ON agent.tenant_id = tenant.id LEFT JOIN ai_agent_config ac ON ac.agent_id = agent.id LEFT JOIN ai_agent_model model ON model.id = ac.model_id LEFT JOIN ai_agent_sys_prompt sp ON sp.id = ac.sys_prompt_id ORDER BY agent.created_at ASC
